branch_manifest.description: INSERT INTO silver.DimCurrency (CurrencyAlternateKey, CurrencyName) executed via sp_executesql with a string variable — SQL is not statically resolvable at fixture-generation time

warnings.message: Write logic is embedded in sp_executesql called with a NVARCHAR variable (@sql), not a literal string. The INSERT SQL is not statically visible to the scoping agent, so fixture-based testing cannot reproduce this branch. Additionally, the recovered SQL references a cross-database table (MigrationTest.bronze.Currency) which is outside sandbox scope.

details.recovered_sql: INSERT INTO silver.DimCurrency (CurrencyAlternateKey, CurrencyName) SELECT CurrencyCode, CurrencyName FROM MigrationTest.bronze.Currency
